description_long: This is a rectangular cardboard box labeled 'FALCON MEDICALS', primarily white with blue accents and a stylized falcon logo. The box is designed for medical use, specifically containing silk non-absorbable natural multifilament sutures. The front and side panels display detailed product information, including suture size (4/0, 1.5 metric), length (75 cm), needle type (3/8 circle reverse cutting, 19 mm), and quantity (12 pieces). The packaging also features manufacturing and expiry dates, CE marking, and sterilization symbols. The box appears sturdy and is likely sealed to protect its sterile contents. Its clean, professional design is typical for medical supplies intended for clinical or hospital environments.
description: A white and blue rectangular box labeled 'FALCON MEDICALS', containing silk surgical sutures with detailed product and branding information.
description_view_0: The main face of the box shows the 'FALCON MEDICALS' branding, falcon logo, and a blue accent with product type and description.
description_view_1: The side panel displays detailed product specifications, including suture size, length, needle type, quantity, and regulatory markings.
description_view_2: The opposite broad face repeats the branding and blue accent, with less detailed text than the main face.
description_view_3: This view mirrors view 1, showing the same detailed product and regulatory information on the side panel.
attribute_label_text: FALCON MEDICALS SILK Non-Absorbable Natural Multifilament 4/0 (1.5 METRIC)-75cm 3/8 circle reverse cutting 19mm 12PCS REF: 210126 MFG: 01.2021 EXP: 01.2026 STERILE CE 1282
attribute_brand_logo: stylized falcon bird in black next to the word 'FALCON'
